About This Piece

Handcrafted from premium full-grain leather, this jacket represents the pinnacle of modern craftsmanship. Each piece is individually numbered and verified through our NFC authentication system.

Material Full-Grain Leather
Origin Italy
Collection FW 2025
Edition Limited
The Story

Born from a commitment to sustainability and artisan tradition, every piece in our collection carries a story of ethical production, fair wages, and environmental responsibility.
